name: macro
description: System macro actions — keystrokes, hotkeys, text input, and app launching

params.keys: Key combo string (e.g. ctrl+c, alt+tab, ctrl+shift+s)

params.key: Key name or character (e.g. enter, escape, a, f5)

macro.type.description: Type a text string via SendKeys

macro.launch.description: Launch an application, URL, or file

params.target: App name, URL (http/https), or file path
